meaning: n.鍕樻紡,澶卞療,鐤忓拷,澶辫触,灏忓績鐓ч【
examples: William was angered and embarrassed by his oversight.
I didn't mean to leave her name off the list; it was an oversight.
The bill creates an oversight board with the authority to investigate and punish accounting firms.
The regulatory system - the oversight system failed, and we are now paying the price.
"This smells, this really smells, " he said of the FAA's apparently lax oversight of Valujet before the crash.
